mapper.select: SELECT * FROM device ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device(device_uuid, device_name, device_type, status, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{deviceUuid}, #{deviceName}, #{deviceType}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE device SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE device_uuid = #{uuid}
UPDATE device SET user_id = #{userId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
